blogPosts.title: Beyondtech: Building an End-to-End Remittance & Disbursement Ecosystem
blogPosts.excerpt: As a Senior Frontend engineer, I built Beyondtech's landing page, merchant dashboard, and admin panel for secure, global, and fully digital remittance and disbursement services.

inlineImages.alt: Merchant dashboard and transaction flow view

content: Beyondtech operates in remittance and disbursement, delivering global and digital money transfer services. I worked on this project while at PT Adisena Mitra Usaha, serving as Senior Frontend to keep the user experience consistent across the full product ecosystem.

In this work project, project1 represents the landing page (beyondtech.co.id), project2 represents the merchant dashboard (dashboard.beyondtech.co.id), and project3 represents the admin panel (admin.beyondtech.co.id). This mapping made it easier to align visual direction while keeping feature priorities clear for each app.

On the landing page, my focus was trust-building, service clarity, and strong call-to-action pathways. The information architecture was designed to communicate product value quickly to prospective merchants and partners.

On the merchant dashboard, I designed the end-to-end transaction flow to make remittance and disbursement actions clear, fast, and less error-prone. I collaborated closely with backend engineers on API contracts, transaction states, input validation, and edge-case handling under real network conditions.

On the admin panel, the primary users are superadmins and internal Beyondtech teams who monitor the full disbursement flow. I prioritized operational visibility through informative tables, precise filters, traceable transaction details, and status indicators that support monitoring and investigation workflows.

From a technical standpoint, I implemented reusable component architecture, clean state structures, and unified UI standards across all domains. This improved feature delivery speed without sacrificing consistency, and made Beyondtech one of the most strategic fintech projects in my portfolio.

blogPosts.title: DocuCraft | Modular Documentation Builder
blogPosts.excerpt: A work project at PT Gateway Internusa: a high-performance CMS for technical documentation and knowledge bases, featuring a modular drag-and-drop editor that enables structured content creation without code.
content: DocuCraft is a project I worked on while at PT Gateway Internusa. It was designed as a high-performance Content Management System focused specifically on technical documentation and knowledge bases.

The platform's core value lies in its modular builder, which allows users to create documentation visually through a drag-and-drop experience similar to Notion. This approach makes it possible to build structured, scalable, and intuitive documentation without writing code directly.

On the frontend side, my focus was keeping the editor responsive while handling dynamic components and complex content hierarchies. I shaped the interface to balance authoring flexibility, layout clarity, and performance as users added, moved, and reorganized content blocks.

Technically, the project used Next.js, microservices, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript. That stack helped the team build a modular platform that could scale well while staying efficient for continuously evolving product documentation needs.

blogPosts.title: PsycheHire | Integrated Recruitment & Psychological Assessment Platform
blogPosts.excerpt: A comprehensive end-to-end recruitment ecosystem that bridges talent acquisition with psychological evaluation, featuring a marketplace for licensed psychologists.
content: PsycheHire is a comprehensive recruitment platform I developed at PT Gateway Internusa. The platform bridges the gap between traditional talent acquisition and data-driven psychological evaluation.

The ecosystem serves three user segments: Candidates receive a streamlined job search experience with built-in aptitude and personality assessments. Employers access data-driven candidate screening through real-time test results and analytics. Professional psychologists have a dedicated marketplace to create, host, and monetize proprietary psychometric tests.

From a frontend perspective, the key challenge was managing multi-user experience complexity, conditional assessment routing, and real-time analytics visualization. I designed intuitive interfaces for each user persona while maintaining application performance.

Technically, the platform was built with Next.js and JavaScript, integrating testing frameworks, analytics engines, and payment systems. This project demonstrates how modern recruitment can be connected with psychological science through scalable digital technology.

blogPosts.title: Sushimoo | Digital Brand Identity & Corporate Profile
blogPosts.excerpt: A modern, high-conversion corporate profile website for a premium sushi restaurant, translating culinary brand identity into digital space with interactive experiences and optimized user journeys.
content: Sushimoo is a digital brand profile project I developed at Ifabula for a premium sushi restaurant. The website was designed with a focus on translating the restaurant's culinary identity into a compelling digital experience.

The design emphasizes high-fidelity visual storytelling with interactive menus, stunning food photography, and optimized user journeys to drive physical foot traffic and brand loyalty. Every visual element was carefully selected to reflect Sushimoo's premium positioning.

I built an interface that balances aesthetics, performance, and conversion optimization. Users can explore menus effortlessly, view detailed descriptions, experience the restaurant's ambiance, and navigate directly to booking or contact options.

This project demonstrates how restaurant brands can translate to digital experiences that are not only informative but also drive engagement and encourage real-world visits through thoughtful design and seamless user interactions.

blogPosts.title: Metro Bekasi News | Law Enforcement Information Hub
blogPosts.excerpt: A specialized web-based news and information platform for Polres Metro Bekasi (Metro Bekasi Resort Police), serving as a centralized hub for official press releases and public safety announcements.
content: Metro Bekasi News is a specialized news platform developed for Polres Metro Bekasi (Metro Bekasi Resort Police). The platform functions as a centralized hub for official press releases, public safety announcements, and community-centric reporting.

The platform is designed with a focus on credibility, accessibility, and user engagement. Each news item is categorized, tagged for relevance, and optimized for discoverability through search and browsing experiences.

From a frontend perspective, I ensured clear information architecture, fast loading performance, and full responsiveness across devices. Citizens can easily access the latest public safety information, follow relevant categories, and share important updates.
This project demonstrates the importance of digital communication in law enforcement and how technology can enhance transparency and build public trust in government institutions.

blogPosts.title: Metro Bekasi Danger Button | Emergency Response Integration
blogPosts.excerpt: A high-priority public safety project featuring a 'one-hit' emergency button that uses Geofencing/GPS protocols to instantly connect citizens with the nearest available police unit.
content: Metro Bekasi Danger Button is a high-priority public safety project developed in collaboration with Polres Metro Bekasi. The application features a 'one-hit' emergency button that uses Geofencing and GPS protocols.

Core functionality: Citizens can send a distress signal with a single click, instantly connecting with the nearest available police unit. The system uses real-time geolocation to maximize response time and accuracy.

I was responsible for frontend implementation that ensures reliability and responsiveness, maintaining button accessibility and fast response times even under poor network conditions. UX design prioritized usability in emergency situations.
This project is critical for public safety infrastructure, demonstrating how mobile technology can become a life-saving tool in emergency response systems and citizen protection.

blogPosts.title: Polres Jakarta Utara AI | Law Enforcement Intelligence Project
blogPosts.excerpt: A collaborative initiative with the North Jakarta Resort Police to integrate Artificial Intelligence into law enforcement workflows, enhancing operational efficiency and data-driven decision-making.
content: Polres Jakarta Utara AI is a high-level collaborative initiative with the North Jakarta Resort Police to integrate Artificial Intelligence into law enforcement workflows. The project focuses on leveraging AI to enhance operational efficiency and data-driven decision-making.

The platform integrates machine learning models for pattern recognition, predictive analytics, and automated intelligence reporting. Police officers can access AI-powered insights for strategic planning and resource allocation.

Frontend development involved building intuitive dashboards, data visualization tools, and AI-assisted reporting interfaces. UX design had to accommodate diverse law enforcement professionals and operational constraints.
This project showcases cutting-edge AI applications in the public sector, demonstrating how emerging technologies can enhance law enforcement effectiveness and contribute to community safety.

blogPosts.title: Komindo Marketplace & Management System (MMS) | UMKM E-Commerce Ecosystem
blogPosts.excerpt: A scalable e-commerce ecosystem engineered to empower local SMEs (UMKM), providing comprehensive management dashboards for vendors to streamline sales and inventory.
content: Komindo Marketplace is a scalable e-commerce ecosystem specifically engineered to empower local SMEs (UMKM). The platform combines a customer-facing marketplace with a comprehensive vendor management system.

For customers, the marketplace offers an intuitive shopping experience with thousands of products from verified UMKM vendors. For vendors and SMEs, a complete management dashboard simplifies catalog management, inventory tracking, order processing, and sales analytics.

The marketplace technology is built for scalability, enabling hundreds of vendors to operate simultaneously without performance degradation. Integrated payment gateways, shipping partner connections, and customer support tools are all available within one unified platform.

This project represents a commitment to empowering local economies through digital transformation, giving SMEs access to broader customer bases and enterprise-grade tools previously available only to large-scale retailers.

blogPosts.title: Garage Management System | Dewa Motor - Automotive Service Hub
blogPosts.excerpt: A comprehensive garage management system that stores all operational data for automotive service centers including parts inventory, transactions, mechanic records, and customer information.
content: Garage Management System is an enterprise application developed for Dewa Motor, a professional automotive service center. The system consolidates all aspects of garage operations into a single integrated platform.

Key features include inventory management for automotive parts, transaction tracking for services and sales, employee databases for mechanics and staff, and comprehensive customer records with full service history. The system also provides reporting and analytics for business intelligence.

The application was built with Java, delivering the reliability and performance required for high-volume garage operations. The database structure is designed to handle complex automotive service workflows including warranty tracking, service scheduling, and parts ordering.

This project demonstrates how technology enhances operational efficiency in the automotive service industry, enabling technicians to work more productively and providing customers with better experiences through organized service documentation and faster turnaround times.

blogPosts.title: Rentalin | Fast-Track Vehicle Rental Ecosystem
blogPosts.excerpt: A streamlined vehicle rental marketplace designed for high-speed booking with an intuitive UI that minimizes friction from search to transaction, ensuring rapid user experience.
content: Rentalin is a vehicle rental marketplace designed for high-speed booking experiences. The platform features an intuitive UI that minimizes friction between browsing inventory and completing transactions.

Key features include rapid search and filtering, real-time availability checking, instant booking confirmation, and seamless payment integration. The user journey is optimized for conversion at each step to minimize abandonment.

The frontend architecture uses Next.js for performance optimization, lazy loading for images, and strategic caching for fast page transitions. Dynamic pricing, real-time inventory updates, and complex search logic are handled efficiently across client and server.

The project also includes integrations with multiple payment gateways, vehicle tracking systems, and customer support tools. The UX design prioritizes ease and speed without compromising security and reliability in high-value rental transactions.
